title_header: The God of High School, Episode: 10

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: This comic is 100% fictional and is not intended to represent factual history or reality. Year 196X, Republic of Korea, The National Assembly Building.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: One day, 38 armed North Korean espionage agents infiltrated South Korea. 37 out of 38 were shot dead and one was captured alive.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The South Korean government took a great interest in the captive's combat power.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: It invited 50 martial artists in South Korea. Now, let's begin.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: To fight one-on-one with the captive. And the result was: Seriously Injured: 15, Unconsciousness: 9, Killed: 26.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What martial arts do you practice?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Taekwondo.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: For a while, Korean Taekwondo was unified as one group. Over time, it divided into two styles: WTF Taekwondo and ITF Taekwondo.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The mainstream Taekwondo in South Korea developed into a sport using mostly kicks. The mainstream Taekwondo in North Korea developed into a killing skill using both kicks and fists. For your information, ITF Taekwondo is practiced in South Korea as well. With help from their allies, China and the Soviet Union, the North Korean National Defense Commission started a new project with ITF Taekwondo. Utilizing the Soviet Union's scientific technology, they analyzed and compared 5,000 years worth of Chinese traditional martial arts. They also supplemented and sampled the pros and cons of various martial arts moves. North Korea succeeded in unifying ITF Taekwondo with this data. With ITF Taekwondo, one combat infantry has power equivalent to that of one platoon. A killing skill designed for North Korean espionage agents, ITF Taekwondo. To put it simply, Northern Style ITF Taekwondo.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hmm...

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: W-What's going on?!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Wouldn't it be a waste if this ended with me just pulling your hair one time?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Indeed, anger is the energy that makes you stronger. But strength based on anger may also lead to one's downfall. Momentary anger can make you temporarily strong, but that energy doesn't last long, and its aftereffects can easily harm you. To be angry but not stay angry at the same time, the key is balance of Yin and Yang.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Those feelings of anger and your tolerance for it, as you go to and from both extremes, keep your inner balance. If you can moderate your anger and focus all your energy on one point, you will possess the ultimate power of T'ai Chi Chuan.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What are you thinking about so seriously? You're really beginning to annoy me! Are you ignoring me? Here!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Anger boiling deep inside.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: And peace inside that anger.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Here we go! Becoming one!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Eh?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The ultimate power of T'ai Chi Chuan. Extreme arts.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hehe! That tickles!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What? Why do you look so surprised?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: In T'ai Chi Chuan, there's something about Yin Yang, blah blah, but ultimately, it's about wave motion.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Sorry, but the moment you transferred that wave motion to me, I simply reflected it.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: It's called Northern Style Wave Reflection.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: So that's why he was able to endure my Jong Beo Gwan.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I didn't reflect it back 'cause I didn't wanna hurt you, sweetie. Yuck!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Anyway, everybody listen carefully. If you want to go home with your body intact, it'll be best for you to withdraw on your own.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hm...

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: By the way, how did he learn that form of Taekwondo?

summary: This episode provides a detailed history of Taekwondo, focusing on the development of Northern Style ITF Taekwondo by North Korea for espionage. A fight then ensues where a character demonstrates T'ai Chi Chuan, only for their opponent to counter it using a technique called 'Northern Style Wave Reflection'.
